summary: Align login theming and repair reviewed approval visibility, grouping, and audit status display.

notes: No database schema or RPC changes are included in this release.
A read-only diagnostic SQL script was added to find approved timesheets whose current approval graph still contains rejected nodes.
No automatic historical data repair is performed by this release.
Aligned the login card surface and input backgrounds with the active light or dark theme.
Added a reviewed-week selector and grouped reviewed timesheets using the same weekly structure as pending approvals.
Show reviewed overtime records in the reviewed tab for the selected week.
Added per-assignee approval audit details to the approval chain, including action labels, action time, and comments.
Derived reviewed timesheet display status from the current approval graph so a later rejected node is shown as waiting for resubmission instead of falsely approved.
Added approval_status to timesheet detail data and used it for the expanded detail status badge.

verification: Run deploy/scripts/pre-deploy-check.sh on the cloud host with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.25.
Run scripts/smoke-frontend-render.mjs against production with EXPECTED_VERSION=V0.18.25.
known_warnings: Vite may still warn that some chunks are larger than 500 kB.
The diagnostic SQL script is intentionally read-only and does not change historical approval records.
